<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep the title a Conventional Commit, e.g. "feat: …" / "fix: …". -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] breaking change (`feat!` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`) (major)
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `test` / `ci` / `refactor` (no release)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes (new logic is covered)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/flags/config changed
- [ ] No secrets/PII added; redaction unaffected or covered by a test
